title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Reiju, Unknown person #3 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was not supposed to arrive aboard this ship, but instead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It seems we have lost our way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yohoho! Wonderful! I never thought that'd we'd find you so quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, he ate some poisonous fish and now he's about to die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any antibodies aboard your ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't blame you though, we do look alike.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not Sanji, but Yonji?! His face is the spitting image of Sanji's!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even his eyebrows are curly! How are you not Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My relationship with this Sanji you all know is a clandestine matter.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: So he has a little brother, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! How did you figure out he's Sanji's little brother?!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: You really are Sanji, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're leaving. There's no reason for us to be here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's Yonji, for crying out loud! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rash is spreading! His resistance is dropping!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a virulent poison... Luffy should be virtual- ally invulnerable given all the antibodies he has...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
